videos.headline: McMillan sets Arizona record with 304 receiving yards, 4 TDs in win
videos.description: Tetairoa McMillan sets an Arizona record with 304 receiving yards and four touchdowns.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (McMillan sets Arizona record with 304 receiving yards, 4 TDs in win) 2024/09/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Noah Fifita finds Tetairoa McMillan for 69-yard Arizona TD
videos.description: Noah Fifita connects with Tetairoa McMillan on the long Arizona touchdown early in the first quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Noah Fifita finds Tetairoa McMillan for 69-yard Arizona TD) 2024/09/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Fifita, McMillan connect for 2nd TD of the night
videos.description: Tetairoa McMillan hauls in his second touchdown catch of the night for Arizona.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Fifita, McMillan connect for 2nd TD of the night) 2024/09/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Naquari Rogers hauls in New Mexico's 2nd TD of the night
videos.description: Naquari Rogers scores New Mexico's second touchdown as the Lobos tie the score.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Naquari Rogers hauls in New Mexico’s 2nd TD of the night) 2024/09/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Devon Dampier gives New Mexico lead on the road
videos.description: Devon Dampier's touchdown gives New Mexico the 24-17 lead over Arizona.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Devon Dampier gives New Mexico lead on the road) 2024/09/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Arizona's Quali Conley breaks off 51-yard rushing TD
videos.description: Quali Conley goes 51 yards untouched into the end zone to give Arizona a double-digit lead over New Mexico.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Arizona's Quali Conley breaks off 51-yard rushing TD) 2024/09/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tetairoa McMillan scores 4th TD of game from 40 yards out
videos.description: Tetairoa McMillan continues to add to his ridiculous stat line with a 40-yard touchdown for Arizona.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tetairoa McMillan scores 4th TD of game from 40 yards out) 2024/09/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Devon Dampier crosses goal line for 7-yard rushing touchdown
videos.description: Devon Dampier crosses goal line for 7-yard rushing touchdown

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Devon Dampier crosses goal line for 7-yard rushing touchdown) 2024/09/01 ESHEET
